response: - the gene of the spirit is revealed through the language of the holy scripture, where the visit of the guru brings about a deep understanding of the sacred teachings. the language of the gurumukhs is a bridge between the spirit and the material world, and through this connection, the gene of the spirit is passed on to the next generation. the spirit of the guru is manifested in the language of the holy scripture, and through the visit of the guru, the gene of the spirit is carried forward. the language of the gurumukhs is a means of communication with the spirit, and through this, the gene of the spirit is preserved and transmitted to the next generation. *** the language of the gurumukhs is a sacred medium through which the spirit of the guru is communicated, and through this, the gene of the spirit is passed on to the next generation. the visit of the guru brings about a deep understanding of the sacred teachings, and through this, the gene of the spirit is revealed. the spirit of the guru is manifested in the language of the holy scripture, and through this, the gene of the spirit is preserved and transmitted to the next generation. the language of the gurumukhs is a means of communication with the spirit, and through this, the gene of the spirit is carried forward.
